sign_descriptions.visible_ribs: Rib cage is clearly visible through skin, indicating severe loss of body fat and muscle.
sign_descriptions.flat_belly: Abdomen is sunken/flat due to loss of subcutaneous fat, a sign of energy deprivation.
sign_descriptions.wasted_arms: Upper arm is visibly thin with muscle wasting, consistent with severe undernutrition.
sign_descriptions.visible_back_bones: Spine and/or shoulder blades are prominently visible, indicating muscle and fat loss.
sign_descriptions.distended_belly: Abdomen is swollen and protruding due to fluid retention from protein deficiency.
sign_descriptions.moon_face: Cheeks appear puffy and rounded due to edema from severe protein deficiency.
